metadata.name: Respond to Citizen Report of a Broken Streetlight

description: A citizen reports a broken streetlight via the city's mobile app. An operator must create a work order for the repair.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge a new 'broken streetlight' service request from the citizen reporting system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the details of the report, including location and citizen photo.

nodes.task_description: Verify the location and identify the specific streetlight asset ID from the city's asset database.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the location and links the report to a specific asset.

nodes.task_description: Create a maintenance work order for the public works department, including all report details.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates and assigns the work order.
